## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes with no regressions
- [ ] New code is covered by unit or integration tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the SDK types (`sdk/src/types/`)
- [ ] Relevant docs updated (`docs/` or README)
